statement: In every magma, Equation 2348 (`x = (y * (y * (z * x))) * y`) implies Equation 2530 (`x = (y * ((y * x) * x)) * x`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0729
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op y (op y (op z x))) y)) :
    ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op y (op (op y x) x)) x)
